title: Gibsons Motoring Memorabilia 1000 Piece Jigsaw Puzzle for Adults Vintage Classic Cars | Nostalgic Traditional Jigsaw Sustainable Premium 100% Recycled Board | Great Gifts | Gibsons Games
features: 🧩 ICONIC VINTAGE CARS: This 1000 piece puzzle is jam-packed with classic cars dating back to the early 20th century, from retro MGs to early Rolls Royce models.
🧩1000 PIECE PUZZLE: Painted by Janice Daughters, this puzzle is an excellent challenge for jigsaw enthusiasts. It is the perfect gift for parents, grandparents, friends, family, and couples.
🧩 PREMIUM QUALITY: Precision engineered from the thickest puzzle board on the market, the pieces perfectly interlock. The jigsaw has a non-glare finish.

🧩 PRODUCT DIMENSIONS: Puzzle is 68 x 49 cm/ 27 x 19”, with box dimensions of 24 x 24 x 6 cm/ 9.5 x 9.5 x 2.5”. Includes an artwork poster for you to reference while piecing together your jigsaw puzzle.
🧩 ECO-FRIENDLY: We’re B Corp certified! We manufacture in the UK/EU using 100% recycled puzzle board, vegetable-based inks and biodegradable labels.
description: From the manufacturer Over 100 Years in the Making We’re Gibsons, the family-owned jigsaw puzzle and board game company. Founded in London in 1919, we’ve been entertaining generations for over 100 years and our passion is creating the best quality products for all ages. What’s more, our jigsaw puzzles are planet-friendly. They’re made from 100% recycled board. Our Jigsaws come in various piece counts 100XXL, 250XL and 500XL Piece Jigsaw Puzzles The 100XXL puzzle pieces are five times the size of those in our 1000 puzzles. The pieces in our 250XL and 500XL puzzles are twice the size of Gibsons' standard pieces. These extra large piece jigsaws are Ideal for those with handling or sight difficulties. 500 Piece Jigsaw Puzzles Those jigsaw fans who fancy doing a smaller puzzle can choose from Gibsons' wide range of the 500 piece designs. Panoramic Jigsaw Puzzles The same width as the 1000 piece puzzles but a reduced height. The shape of these jigsaws is ideal for classic panoramic scenery or . Made in Britain - We use the thickest board on the market for our jigsaw puzzles and work with a whole host of talented artists 2x500 and 4x500 Piece Jigsaw Puzzles Here you will find two or even four beautiful puzzles in a box, each with standard sized pieces. Whether you like to observe a change of seasons or piece together images of some of the most beautiful locations in Britain- you are bound to find the right jigsaw for you. 1000 Piece Jigsaw Puzzles Gibsons' most popular size of blue box puzzles, which have been painted by talented artists from around the world and are made from 100% recycled puzzle board. 2000 Piece Jigsaw Puzzles Our 2000 piece jigsaw puzzles are for those puzzlers who like a real challenge. All of our 2000 piece puzzles are available in other piece counts. A WORD FROM KATE, OUR MANAGING DIRECTOR Working at Gibsons means being open to adapting and learning new things wherever we can, ensuring that we move forward and get better at what we do. Games, puzzles, people and play just about sums up what we do here, but the most important of these is people. The Gibsons Gang are at the heart of our company, their passion driving us forward. I can’t wait to see what the next 100 years bring…
